languages.text: "Договориться с солдатами Инквизиции, провести стражу у ворот. Ничего невероятного". {n}Сенешаль произносит это так буднично, словно сама уже не раз проворачивала нечто подобное.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Договориться с солдатами Инквизиции, провести стражу у ворот. Ничего невероятного". {n}Сенешаль произносит это так буднично, словно сама уже не раз проворачивала нечто подобное.{/n}

languages.text: "You could have made some arrangement with the Inquisition's soldiers, tricked your way past the guards at the gates. Hardly extraordinary." {n}The Seneschal says this as casually as if she herself had done the same thing many times before.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Договориться с солдатами Инквизиции, провести стражу у ворот. Ничего невероятного". {n}Сенешаль произносит это так буднично, словно сама уже не раз проворачивала нечто подобное.{/n}

languages.text: “你完全可以跟审判庭的士兵串通一气，或者耍点花招骗过门口的守卫。这也没什么好稀奇的。”{n}总领说这话时漫不经心，就好像她自己就干过不少回这种事。{/n}
languages.original_text: "You could have made some arrangement with the Inquisition's soldiers, tricked your way past the guards at the gates. Hardly extraordinary." {n}The Seneschal says this as casually as if she herself had done the same thing many times before.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “你完全可以跟审判庭的士兵串通一气，或者耍点花招骗过门口的守卫。这也没什么好稀奇的。”{n}总领说这话时漫不经心，就好像她自己就干过不少回这种事。{/n}

languages.text: « Vous auriez pu vous arranger avec les soldats de l'Inquisition ou détourner l'attention des gardes le temps de franchir les portes. Rien d'extraordinaire là-dedans. » {n}La sénéchale en parle comme si elle-même avait déjà fait la même chose de nombreuses fois.{/n}
languages.original_text: "You could have made some arrangement with the Inquisition's soldiers, tricked your way past the guards at the gates. Hardly extraordinary." {n}The Seneschal says this as casually as if she herself had done the same thing many times before.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Vous auriez pu vous arranger avec les soldats de l'Inquisition ou détourner l'attention des gardes le temps de franchir les portes. Rien d'extraordinaire là-dedans. » {n}La sénéchale en parle comme si elle-même avait déjà fait la même chose de nombreuses fois.{/n}

languages.text: "Engizisyon askerleriyle bir şekilde anlaşmış, sonra da kapılardaki muhafızları kandırıp elini kolunu sallaya sallaya geçmiş olabilirsiniz. Çok da şaşırtıcı değil." {n}Seneşal, bu ihtimalden bahsederken o kadar rahat konuşuyor ki sanki aynı şeyi daha önce defalarca kez yapmış.{/n}
languages.original_text: "You could have made some arrangement with the Inquisition's soldiers, tricked your way past the guards at the gates. Hardly extraordinary." {n}The Seneschal says this as casually as if she herself had done the same thing many times before.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Engizisyon askerleriyle bir şekilde anlaşmış, sonra da kapılardaki muhafızları kandırıp elini kolunu sallaya sallaya geçmiş olabilirsiniz. Çok da şaşırtıcı değil." {n}Seneşal, bu ihtimalden bahsederken o kadar rahat konuşuyor ki sanki aynı şeyi daha önce defalarca kez yapmış.{/n}

languages.text: «Podría haber llegado a un acuerdo con los soldados de la Inquisición o engañado a los guardias de la entrada. No es algo extraordinario». {n}La Senescal lo dice de forma tan casual como si ella misma hubiera hecho algo similar repetidas veces.{/n}
languages.original_text: "You could have made some arrangement with the Inquisition's soldiers, tricked your way past the guards at the gates. Hardly extraordinary." {n}The Seneschal says this as casually as if she herself had done the same thing many times before.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Podría haber llegado a un acuerdo con los soldados de la Inquisición o engañado a los guardias de la entrada. No es algo extraordinario». {n}La Senescal lo dice de forma tan casual como si ella misma hubiera hecho algo similar repetidas veces.{/n}

languages.text: "Ihr könntet ein Arrangement mit den Soldaten der Inquisition getroffen und Euch an den Wachen an den Toren vorbeigemogelt haben. Das ist keine große Kunst." {n}Die Truchsessin sagt das, als hätte sie dasselbe selbst schon viele Male getan.{/n}
languages.original_text: "You could have made some arrangement with the Inquisition's soldiers, tricked your way past the guards at the gates. Hardly extraordinary." {n}The Seneschal says this as casually as if she herself had done the same thing many times before.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Ihr könntet ein Arrangement mit den Soldaten der Inquisition getroffen und Euch an den Wachen an den Toren vorbeigemogelt haben. Das ist keine große Kunst." {n}Die Truchsessin sagt das, als hätte sie dasselbe selbst schon viele Male getan.{/n}

languages.text:
「大聖堂の兵士と手を組んで、門の番人を欺いて通り抜けたはずだ。大した事ではない。」{n}
執事長は、まるで自分が何度も同じ事をしたかのように、平然とそう言った。{/n}
languages.original_text: "You could have made some arrangement with the Inquisition's soldiers, tricked your way past the guards at the gates. Hardly extraordinary." {n}The Seneschal says this as casually as if she herself had done the same thing many times before.{/n}

traits.locale_text:
「大聖堂の兵士と手を組んで、門の番人を欺いて通り抜けたはずだ。大した事ではない。」{n}
